shakshi: The three Demigods are free roaming agents in Lapidus — going to work in the world the player built or broke
Shapieru working to stabilize or grow whatever cultural fragments remain after 59 quests
Tagame tending to life in a world that has been through war, plague, plasma weapons, and demonic infiltration
Lanzu navigating his dual nature — divine knowledge and demonic betrayal — in the world the player shaped
The last opportunity to close threads before Ko's judgment — things started but not finished, relationships left open
What the Demigods can do is shaped by what the player built or broke — their activity mirrors the world's health
The world can stabilize from here if enough foundations were laid — the condition Game 8 inherits on the canonical path
If foundations were not laid, the Demigods work against ongoing damage — the condition Game 8 inherits on the broken path
